channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Approaches US Pacific Islands, Could Strike Monday

media:content.media:description: The eye of the storm was expected to pass on Monday.

item.description: Bavi was moving westward with sustained winds of 269 kilometres per hour and gusts of 324 kph, the Joint Typhoon Warning Centre said in an update at 7:00 pm local time.
item.content:encoded: Bavi was moving westward with sustained winds of 269 kilometres per hour and gusts of 324 kph, the Joint Typhoon Warning Centre said in an update at 7:00 pm local time.

item.title: "Deeply Disturbing": Germany On Reports Of China Training Russian Troops

media:content.media:description: The German government regularly stresses its concern over China's support for Russia.

item.description: On May 20, the German daily Die Welt reported that the Chinese army had secretly trained several hundred Russian soldiers on its territory.
item.content:encoded: On May 20, the German daily Die Welt reported that the Chinese army had secretly trained several hundred Russian soldiers on its territory.

item.title: Iran Is Preparing Thousands Of Graves As Millions Gather For Khamenei Funeral

media:content.media:description: The report says officials have created a dedicated unit to deal with potential deaths and missing persons

item.description: According to German newspaper Die Welt, Iranian officials have drawn up emergency plans anticipating anywhere between 1,500 and 3,000 fatalities during the days-long funeral processions, which are expected to attract millions of mourners.
item.content:encoded: According to German newspaper Die Welt, Iranian officials have drawn up emergency plans anticipating anywhere between 1,500 and 3,000 fatalities during the days-long funeral processions, which are expected to attract millions of mourners.

item.title: Ukraine Strikes Putin's Hometown, Says Russian Seizure Of Key Town A 'Lie'

media:content.media:description: Zelensky also claimed Kyiv struck the Kronstadt naval base in Saint Petersburg.

item.description: Moscow said almost 400 Ukrainian drones attacked over a dozen Russian regions since Friday evening - including Moscow and Saint Petersburg - an attack that came after a Russian strike on Kyiv this week killed 30 people.
item.content:encoded: Moscow said almost 400 Ukrainian drones attacked over a dozen Russian regions since Friday evening - including Moscow and Saint Petersburg - an attack that came after a Russian strike on Kyiv this week killed 30 people.

item.title: Man Charged For Attacking People With High-Powered Water Gun In US

media:content.media:description: The video showed people being targeted while walking, waiting at bus stops, or sleeping.

item.description: According to police, videos posted on a Facebook page linked to Cayce showed several people being sprayed in the face or soaked with water.
item.content:encoded: According to police, videos posted on a Facebook page linked to Cayce showed several people being sprayed in the face or soaked with water.

item.title: Tech Layoffs In 1st Half Of 2026 Outpace Entire 2025, India Second-Worst Hit

media:content.media:description: The United States has been the most affected country.

item.description: AI-related tech layoffs worldwide touched 1.28 lakh employees by July 1, 2026, higher than the 1.25 lakh layoffs recorded during the whole of 2025.
item.content:encoded: AI-related tech layoffs worldwide touched 1.28 lakh employees by July 1, 2026, higher than the 1.25 lakh layoffs recorded during the whole of 2025.

item.title: Indian Army Peacekeepers Get UN Medals For Service In Conflict-Hit DR Congo

media:content.media:description: The recognition of the Indian contingent underscores the Indian Army's reputation.

item.description: The United Nations Medal is awarded to peacekeepers who complete a qualifying period of service under UN missions.
item.content:encoded: The United Nations Medal is awarded to peacekeepers who complete a qualifying period of service under UN missions.

item.title: "Avenge Blood Of Our Leader": Mourners Gather For Ali Khamenei's Funeral

media:content.media:description: The mourners, some in tears, made their way through strict security.

item.description: The mourners, some in tears, made their way through strict security towards the courtyard where Khamenei's coffin was placed for people to pay their respects.
item.content:encoded: The mourners, some in tears, made their way through strict security towards the courtyard where Khamenei's coffin was placed for people to pay their respects.

item.title: UK Man Was Assaulted By Attackers. Cops Arrested Him Instead As Accused Fled
item.description: A clip of the footage was shared by Reform UK's Shadow Chancellor and Newark MP Robert Jenrick, who criticised the Birmingham Police in multiple posts.
item.content:encoded: A clip of the footage was shared by Reform UK's Shadow Chancellor and Newark MP Robert Jenrick, who criticised the Birmingham Police in multiple posts.

item.title: "Trump's Still Your President": White House Mocks Taylor Swift Wedding

media:content.media:description: Trump's posts arrive after years of public disagreements between him and Taylor Swift.

item.description: The White House's official social media accounts shared a series of posts that appeared to take inspiration from Swift's music and branding.
item.content:encoded: The White House's official social media accounts shared a series of posts that appeared to take inspiration from Swift's music and branding.

item.title: "Send Them To Iran Or Cuba": Trump Spokeswoman Slams 'Lazy' Gen Z In Viral Remark

media:content.media:description: Karoline Leavitt is the 36th and current White House Press Secretary under President Donald Trump.

item.description: Leavitt's remarks quickly drew criticism online, with many commentators arguing that they overlooked the economic challenges facing young Americans.
item.content:encoded: Leavitt's remarks quickly drew criticism online, with many commentators arguing that they overlooked the economic challenges facing young Americans.

item.title: Over 8,000 Civilians Killed In Ukrainian Strikes Since War Broke Out: Russia

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian attacks damaged civilian infrastructure across 42 regions over past 3 months, Russia said

item.description: From February 2022 to June 30, 2026, the total number of casualties reached 30,913, including about 8,434 fatalities
item.content:encoded: From February 2022 to June 30, 2026, the total number of casualties reached 30,913, including about 8,434 fatalities

item.title: "Don't Know If I Look Good": Trump On Not Wearing Bathing Suit

media:content.media:description: Trump added that he doesn't have much time to read books.

item.description: Speaking with Usha Vance on "Storytime with the Second Lady," as America celebrated its 250th birthday, the billionaire property tycoon opened with his favorite topic -- real estate, of course.
item.content:encoded: Speaking with Usha Vance on "Storytime with the Second Lady," as America celebrated its 250th birthday, the billionaire property tycoon opened with his favorite topic -- real estate, of course.

item.title: US Independence Day Parade In Washington Cancelled Due To Extreme Heat

media:content.media:description: The brutal heat prompted a massive governmental response.

item.description: Around 160 million Americans were under either major or extreme heat warnings as the country prepared to mark the 250th anniversary of its independence, according to the National Weather Service.
item.content:encoded: Around 160 million Americans were under either major or extreme heat warnings as the country prepared to mark the 250th anniversary of its independence, according to the National Weather Service.

item.title: "Knocked Hell Out Of Them": Trump As Iran Holds Ali Khamenei's Funeral

media:content.media:description: Iran chose July 4, the 250th anniversary of the creation of the US, to begin Khamenei's funeral.

item.description: Ali Khamenei, who ruled Iran for 36 years, was killed on February 28 - the day the US and Israel began striking Iran, triggering a war in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei, who ruled Iran for 36 years, was killed on February 28 - the day the US and Israel began striking Iran, triggering a war in the Middle East.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's Funeral Begins In Iran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Preparations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public funeral are taking place in Tehran, following which his remains will be taken to the Iraqi holy cities of Najaf and Karbala.
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Preparations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public funeral are taking place in Tehran, following which his remains will be taken to the Iraqi holy cities of Najaf and Karbala.

item.title: At Ali Khamenei's Funeral, A Small Coffin, Picture Of His 14-Month-Old Granddaughter

media:content.media:description: Her small coffin, draped in the national flag, was displayed along with her framed photo.

item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's granddaughter, Zahra Mohammadi Golpayegani, was killed alongside him and some other family members on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's granddaughter, Zahra Mohammadi Golpayegani, was killed alongside him and some other family members on February 28.

item.title: 'Fake News': Israel Rejects Report On Plotting To Kill Iranian Negotiators

media:content.media:description: Officials named in report were Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf

item.description: US is Israel's closest ally, but President Donald Trump has been publicly critical of Israeli PM Netanyahu in recent weeks after Israel's war with Hezbollah in Lebanon threatened peace talks with Iran.
item.content:encoded: US is Israel's closest ally, but President Donald Trump has been publicly critical of Israeli PM Netanyahu in recent weeks after Israel's war with Hezbollah in Lebanon threatened peace talks with Iran.

item.title: Over 100 Hindu-Americans Mark US 250th Anniversary, Raise Hinduphobia Concerns

media:content.media:description: Organisers said the annual advocacy day is intended to strengthen dialogue

item.description: Hosted by the Coalition of Hindus of North America (CoHNA), the event brought together lawmakers, community leaders, students, veterans, researchers and interfaith representatives
item.content:encoded: Hosted by the Coalition of Hindus of North America (CoHNA), the event brought together lawmakers, community leaders, students, veterans, researchers and interfaith representatives

item.title: Baloch Rebels Claim They Killed Over 30 Pak Coast Guards In Suicide Bombing

media:content.media:description: The BLA is one of several separatist groups active in Balochistan. (Representational image)

item.description: The rebel group said the attack took place at approximately 6:32 pm on July 3, when a member of its elite Majeed Brigade allegedly drove an explosive-laden Mazda vehicle into the Coast Guards camp.
item.content:encoded: The rebel group said the attack took place at approximately 6:32 pm on July 3, when a member of its elite Majeed Brigade allegedly drove an explosive-laden Mazda vehicle into the Coast Guards camp.
